W1_cold_single.notes: Phase 2 placeholder. Archivist not wired; stub measures baseline shape. Real numbers land in Phase 3 release.

W2_cold_bulk.notes: Phase 2 placeholder. Bulk manifest stubbed; Phase 6 will assert manifest equality.

W3_hot_loop.notes: Phase 2 placeholder. Absolute ceiling (not ratio). Hot-path handler not wired; ring buffer stubbed at 256 entries per Follow-up #17/#18.

W3_contended.notes: Phase 2 placeholder. Multi-process p99 ≤ 5ms ceiling per Follow-up #13. Shares hot-path harness via WRITER_PROCS env knob.

W4_read_cache.notes: Phase 2 placeholder. Cache hit + miss recorded in same run so the ratio is local. Read cache stubbed as Map.

W5_inter_store_cascade.notes: Phase 2 placeholder. Audit-tree depth ≤ 3 invariant enforced structurally in the cascade stub.

phase_5_contention.notes: ADR-0180 Phase 5 #10 baseline placeholder. Assertion thresholds: ratio <= 1.5, max_wait <= 200ms. Initial values give headroom; real numbers land when Phase 5 production primitive is wired.
